_comment: ADR-0035 re-export shim inventory + deprecation policy (#1029 A1 — the shim-deprecation front). Each entry WAS a src/ module that was a PURE `pub use <canonical>` re-export left in place ONLY for path back-compat after the de-monolith relocated its contents into a lean leaf crate. Per the #1029 review these were DEPRECATED indirection, NOT a permanent layer: the v2.0.0 MAJOR (docs/adr/0035-shim-removal-v2-plan.md, VERSIONING_POLICY §5.1) was the removal milestone. This ratchet (ci/check_reexport_shims.py) is now a PERMANENT ZERO-TOLERANCE guard: `max_shims` is 0, so ANY new `pub use <crate>::...` re-export shim module reds CI — the indirection cannot return. v2.0.0 MIGRATION COMPLETE (executed in waves): (17->16) src/gateway/interceptor.rs — internal import-surface shim, zero consumers. (16->14) src/gateway/cmd_vel.rs + src/posture_tracker.rs — dead leaf shims, zero consumers. (14->7) WAVE 1 — 7 trivial leaf shims deleted: adapters, protocol_adapter, federation_reconciliation, kinematics_sim, gateway/containment, governor_guard, federation. (7->3) WAVE 2 — 4 medium leaf shims: attestation (kirra_safety_authority), capture (kirra_core), ota_campaign (kirra_ota_campaign), fabric/asset (kirra_fabric_types). (3->1) WAVE 3 — 2 large gateway leaf shims: gateway/kinematics_contract + gateway/perception_monitor (both kirra_core; the FROZEN talisman blob stayed in kirra_core, only the import path renamed). (1->0) WAVE 4 (FINAL) — verifier_store (kirra_persistence, XL ~64 files) deleted alongside the v2.0.0 version bump. max_shims is now 0 and the ratchet is a permanent zero-tolerance guard.
